af_corroboration: PARTIAL — the tag's per-superpopulation frequency tracking the allele's known population structure is necessary-not-sufficient. The SCORED number is the sample-level concordance vs a real HLA truth set (--truth).
sample_concordance_status: PENDING — supply a free published 1000G HLA truth TSV via --truth (e.g. Gourraud 2014); this is an external data-acquisition step, NOT a code wall. The harness computes sens/spec/PPV of the tag proxy.
